content_blocks.text: No development permit shall be issued in a Residential Town House (RTH) Zone except for one

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: or more of the following uses:

content_blocks.text: In any Residential Townhouse (RTH) Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in

Minimum Lot Area 2,000 sq. ft. per unit Minimum Lot Frontage 20 ft. per unit Minimum Front Yard 15 ft. on local or collector streets where a garage is within or attached to the dwelling or where off -site parking is provided; 30 ft. on arterial streets Minimum Rear Yard 20 ft.
